steps.title: Identify the key method statement
steps.content: The notes explicitly tell us that “Wilkerson narrates the personal journeys of George Swanson Starling and Robert Pershing Foster, among others.” This is her documented approach to the subject.

steps.title: Match the method to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly states her methodology: she “chronicles the complex history of the Great Migration... by narrating the journeys of individuals” and provides the specific examples from the notes. Choices A, C, and D either describe the Great Migration itself, list the book's awards, or mention only that Starling appears in the book—none explain her approach to documentation.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
